name: LPI SMILE Orchestrator
description: A senior architecture auditor that validates digital twin concepts against the SMILE framework. It delegates risk assessment to the Risk Analyst Agent and synthesizes the final Missing Reality Report.

supportedInterfaces.comment: Local subprocess. Requires Ollama running on localhost:11434.

skills.name: Digital Twin Concept Auditing
skills.description: Expects a natural language user concept. Calls smile-overview and smile-phase-detail, parses Agent Cards to communicate with secondary agents, and outputs a strict XAI Missing Reality Report.
examples: I want to build a digital twin of Amity University's CSE lab
A digital twin for the Noida Expressway

_lpiMetadata.explainability: Uses a three-tiered provenance system, enforcing LLM narrative citations and exposing raw MCP and A2A JSON payloads in the terminal trace.
